tools.name: alternatives
tools.description: Find and compare alternative packages for a given hex.pm package.

tools.name: audit
tools.description:
Audit a package's dependencies for risks.

Checks each dependency for retired versions, stale packages,
single-owner packages, and known vulnerabilities via OSV.dev.

tools.name: audit_mix_deps
tools.description: Audit mix.exs dependencies for risks.

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Compare 2-5 hex.pm packages side by side.

tools.name: dep_tree
tools.description: Get the full transitive dependency tree for a package (BFS, max depth 5).

tools.name: dependencies
tools.description: Get dependencies for a package version.

tools.name: doc_item
tools.description: Get full documentation for a specific module or function.

tools.name: docs
tools.description: Browse package documentation -- module listing.

tools.name: downloads
tools.description: Get download statistics for a hex.pm package.

tools.name: features
tools.description: Get optional features/extras for a package release.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Comprehensive health check for a hex.pm package.

tools.name: info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a hex.pm package.

tools.name: owners
tools.description: Get owners/maintainers of a hex.pm package.

tools.name: readme
tools.description: Get the README content for a hex.pm package.

tools.name: release
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific package release.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for packages on hex.pm by name/keywords.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search within a package's documentation by name.

tools.name: toolbox_category
tools.description: List the curated projects in an Elixir Toolbox category.

tools.name: toolbox_group
tools.description: List the categories in a single Elixir Toolbox group.

tools.name: toolbox_groups
tools.description: Browse the Elixir Toolbox curated taxonomy of groups and categories.

tools.name: toolbox_search
tools.description:
Search packages via Elixir Toolbox. Results carry GitHub/GitLab stats,
popularity, and health signals not exposed by the raw hex.pm search.

tools.name: toolbox_trending
tools.description: List trending Elixir packages from Elixir Toolbox.

tools.name: upgrade_check
tools.description: Check which mix.exs dependencies have newer versions available.

tools.name: versions
tools.description: List all versions of a hex.pm package.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
